generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values safety and stability, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events have shown that we can't afford to be complacent. While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is that expanded security powers have actually prevented numerous threats without major abuses. Our allies are increasing their security measures too - shouldn't we do the same? The alternative is leaving ourselves vulnerable. #NationalSecurityMatters #SafetyFirst
